title: 2025-10-31 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 17.14
description: Daily pressure check for 2025-10-31: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 17.14/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and volatility shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2025-10-31, the score printed 17.14/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and volatility doing most of the work.
